mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_follow (id, user_id, author_id, create_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{authorId}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_follow WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND author_id = #{authorId}
SELECT * FROM user_follow WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM user_follow WHERE author_id = #{authorId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_follow WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND author_id = #{authorId}
